commands_run: sed -n '1,260p' CLAUDE.md; for f in $(rg --files memory | sort); do sed -n '1,220p' $f; done; find .claude -maxdepth 3 -type f -print; test -d .claude/rules; test -d .claude/imports
git branch --show-current; git remote show origin; git rev-parse HEAD; git status --short
python GitHub REST search for open issues matching source:agent, forensic/type tags, codex/claude/autonomous legacy terms
python GitHub REST list open pull requests
python --version; python -m pytest --version; ruff --version; pyflakes/radon/pip-audit/gh version probes
python -m pip install pyflakes radon pip-audit pytest-cov -q
rg -n network/API/mock/deterministic gate scans across src and tests
python GitHub REST closed/open duplicate searches for radon C signatures
python GitHub REST unauthenticated issue creation auth probe (403 Method forbidden; no issue created)

evidence.doctrine_and_memory_read: CLAUDE.md and every file under memory/ were read from disk with sed loop over rg --files memory.
evidence.claude_assets: .claude/rules and .claude/imports both present; config validator passed.
evidence.github_governance: Unauthenticated GitHub REST search reported zero open matching source-agent/forensic/tagged/legacy issues and zero open PRs; no issue closures or PR creation performed via GitHub.
evidence.tests: 425 passed; coverage total 98%; compileall, ruff, pyflakes, mypy, radon average A, pip-audit passed.
evidence.notes: gh CLI unavailable and no git origin remote; public REST read path was used for issue/PR discovery.
